TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 10
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.515.cipherString: Poetry is a potent tool capable of guiding societies worldwide through its invisible aesthetic strength.
CIPHER.515.question: Suman Pokhrel has been heard to say the following phrase that has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.515.author: Suman Pokhrel

CIPHER.496.cipherString: Discipline transforms the gifted to the great.
CIPHER.496.question: The following strange headlines encode a phrase by Raul Ramos y Sanchez using a Baconian alphabet. You are told that the cipher text BOOK A HOTEL CATCH DRIED decodes to be SCIP. What does it say?
CIPHER.496.author: Raul Ramos y Sanchez

CIPHER.493.cipherString: Writing a book of poetry is like dropping a rose petal down the Grand Canyon and waiting for the echo.
CIPHER.493.question: You came across the following written on a wall in a cave. You are told that it's a quote by Don Marquis encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with WRIT. What does it say?
CIPHER.493.author: Don Marquis

CIPHER.507.cipherString: Experience converts us to ourselves when books fail us.
CIPHER.507.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote by A. B. Alcott encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of PINCH and polybius key of FLAGSHIP. What does it say?
CIPHER.507.author: A. B. Alcott

CIPHER.491.cipherString: You have become a team. And you're going to be drawing upon each other for the rest of your lives.
CIPHER.491.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Mark Milley encoded with an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.491.author: Mark Milley

CIPHER.505.cipherString: One thing is certain in business. You and everyone around you will make mistakes.
CIPHER.505.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Complete Columnar encoded quote by Richard Branson. The quote has AINI somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.505.author: Richard Branson

CIPHER.495.cipherString: Todos tenemos el poder de tomar pequeñas decisiones que pueden cambiar el curso de nuestras vidas para siempre.
CIPHER.495.question: A quote by Oscar Auliq-Ice in Spanish has been encoded using the Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet for you to decode. You are told that the cipher starts with TODOS. What does it say?
CIPHER.495.author: Oscar Auliq-Ice
CIPHER.495.translation: We all have the power to make little choices that can change the course of our lives forever.

CIPHER.514.cipherString: If you intend to change, decide what you want and live your life accordingly.
CIPHER.514.question: Your lava lamp started bubbling in Checkerboard code by Steve Maraboli with a polybius key of VANISHED. What does it say?
CIPHER.514.author: Steve Maraboli

CIPHER.501.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's a quote, written using a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 53708 724061 940428 decode to?

CIPHER.499.cipherString: Have the courage to take off your mask and be humbled.
CIPHER.499.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Ken Poirot encoded as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has OFFYO in it corresponding to the encoded text I N E R B D L J, meaning B = ●××; D = –●–; E = –●×; I = –––; J = ––×; L = –×–; N = ×●●; R = ●●–. What does it say?
CIPHER.499.author: Ken Poirot

CIPHER.504.cipherString: We are the masters at the moment and shall be for some considerable time.
CIPHER.504.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Hartley Shawcross encoded with a Porta using a keyword of VEINS. What does it say?
CIPHER.504.author: Hartley Shawcross

CIPHER.500.cipherString: Happiness comes from within, not from without.
CIPHER.500.question: Your school's intercom crackled to life with static… then spelled out this Fractionated Morse message by David DeNotaris. You are told that the quote has NESSCO in it corresponding to the encoded text F N O S Z R W L, meaning F = –●×; L = –×–; N = ●×●; O = ●●×; R = ●–●; S = ●●●; W = ×––; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.500.author: David DeNotaris

CIPHER.502.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Cryptarithm puzzle. What do the values 151 096071635 287864 decode to?

CIPHER.492.cipherString: The ego relies on the familiar. It is reluctant to experience the unknown, which is they very essence of life.
CIPHER.492.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by Deepak Chopra, written in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.492.author: Deepak Chopra

CIPHER.503.cipherString: When I eventually met Mr. Right I had no idea that his first name was Always.
CIPHER.503.question: Your lab partner's retainer case clicked open to reveal this Porta-encrypted quote by Rita Rudner using a keyword of WARM. What does it say?
CIPHER.503.author: Rita Rudner

CIPHER.494.cipherString: Economists are evaluated on how intelligent they sound, not on a scientific measure of their knowledge of reality.
CIPHER.494.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a quote by Nassim Nicholas Taleb encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with ALITY. What does it say?
CIPHER.494.author: Nassim Nicholas Taleb

CIPHER.511.question: Your solar-powered calculator started flashing this Affine sequence—it's Chris Guillebeau's words with a=11 and b=23. What does it say?
CIPHER.511.author: Chris Guillebeau

CIPHER.513.cipherString: Those who lack the courage will always find a philosophy to justify it.
CIPHER.513.question: Projected by a broken laser pointer during physics class, solve this Checkerboard quote from Albert Camus with a polybius key of PITCHERS. What does it say?
CIPHER.513.author: Albert Camus

CIPHER.508.cipherString: You choose what you learn, just as you choose what you fail at.
CIPHER.508.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a physics exam from years ago. It's a quote by Anthony T. Hincks, encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of SIMPLY and polybius key of DUPLICATE. What does it say?
CIPHER.508.author: Anthony T. Hincks

CIPHER.498.cipherString: There is not enough time to do all the nothing we want to do.
CIPHER.498.question: Your solar-powered calculator started flashing this Baconian sequence—it's Bill Watterson's words. What does it say?
CIPHER.498.author: Bill Watterson

CIPHER.510.cipherString: Nothing puzzles me more than time and space; and yet nothing troubles me less, as I never think about them.
CIPHER.510.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Charles Lamb encoded as a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.510.author: Charles Lamb

CIPHER.497.cipherString: It's not enough to do good. You have to be seen doing good.
CIPHER.497.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Rene Balcer encoded in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.497.author: Rene Balcer

CIPHER.512.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Affine-encrypted message with a=15 and b=19. What does it say?
CIPHER.512.author: Unknown

CIPHER.509.cipherString: He that despairs measures Providence by his own little contracted model.
CIPHER.509.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote, written as an Atbash. What does it say?

CIPHER.506.cipherString: Not everything in life is achievable by a straight path.
CIPHER.506.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Complete Columnar encoded quote by Priyanka Agarwal. The quote has IFEISAC somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.506.author: Priyanka Agarwal
